event.description:
Please register at the free Eventbrite link:

https://www.eventbrite.com/e/sf-spark-meetup-talks-from-spark-watson-and-einstein-tickets-34982003113

This meetup is a key part of the Cognitive Frameworks Festival, uniting open-source community around the city in the week of June 5:

http://festival.framework.foundation

We have 5 talks for this amazing meetup, showcasing the vibrant ecosystem around Apache Spark.

3 main talks, 20 minute each: PySpark Beyond Shuffling -- Why it isn't Magic -- but also where there is some really cool magic
Holden Karau -- Apache Spark Committer, Spark Technology Center, IBM

Apache SystemML: State of the Project and Future Plans
Frederick Reiss -- Chief Architect, Spark Technology Center, IBM

PredictionIO
Kenneth Chen -- Cofounder of PredictionIO and Senior PM on Einstein, Salesforce

2 Lightning talks, about 10min each:

Hyperparameter Optimization -- when scikit-learn meets PySpark
Sven Hafeneger -- Software Engineer, IBM Sparklyr
Javier Luraschi -- RStudio
event.title: [Eventbrite] Spark, Watson and Einstein: Spark.TC, Salesforce and RStudio!
